title: Lives in the Wilderness
summary: You can survive in badlands where others perish.
tiers: Tier 3: Animal Senses and Sensibilities or Wilderness Encouragement
Tier 5: The Wild Is on Your Side
Tier 6: One With the Wild or Wild Camouflage
gm_intrusions: People in cities and towns sometimes disparage those who look (and smell) like they live in the wilds, as if they were ignorant or barbaric.
text: You can survive in badlands where others perish.
details: You can survive in badlands where others perish.
